name: palate-website-builder
description: The Palate website builder. Builds production-grade Astro websites grounded by the Palate MCP (real design taste from deeply-analysed reference sites) and converts brand assets into a four-format design-token package. Bundles the skill, the survey/verify agents, and the depth + done enforcement hooks (the divergent concept spine, the build commission, the screenshot-grounded visual loop, the novelty/buildability gates). Ships an expanded anti-AI-slop layer: a canonical tell catalogue, flag-with-justify lint rules for the of-the-moment default faces, raw untuned accent colours, gradient-text and glassmorphism, plus the structural / trust-chrome / AI-washing doctrine and a render-side Quick QA pass. Connect the Palate MCP with one `claude mcp add` command (your token from app.palatemcp.com).
